text:
Asia/Singapore (SGT) is UTC+7:00 (historical approximation for 1748, though time zones weren't standardized then; using modern offsets for consistency).  
Asia/Kolkata (IST) is UTC+5:30.  
UTC+7 is 1 hour 30 minutes ahead of UTC+5:30.  
So 02:00 SGT = 00:30 IST same date.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 00:30, November 19, 1748
